message:
feat(update): Add legacy state path fallback for XDG migration

When loading update check state, fall back to the legacy state path
if the current path doesn't exist. This ensures users who upgrade
from pre-XDG versions don't lose their update check timestamps.

Both sync (load) and async (load_async) methods now check the legacy
path as a fallback, enabling seamless migration without requiring
explicit state file moves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
